quick_pass.note: 3 trace mismatches, all confirmed via wc -l as file-shrinkage line-range overshoot (benign category, not wrong-file/hallucination): server/src/ws/wsTransportMode.ts:1-130 vs actual 93 lines (~28% over); frontend/src/utils/splitWebSocketLifecycle.ts:1-64 vs actual 35 lines (~45% over, the largest drift found in this chunk); frontend/src/utils/webSocketUrl.ts:1-74 vs actual 71 lines (negligible ~4% over). All referenced files exist and match their stated roles (transport parser, split lifecycle gating, URL construction). Kept as quick_pass per the file-shortening exception, but the splitWebSocketLifecycle.ts drift is proportionally the largest observed across both chunks and may warrant a light trace refresh even though it does not block feasibility. VE (WsRouterSplitHandshake.test.ts, wsTransportMode.test.ts, webSocketUrl.test.ts, splitWebSocketLifecycle.test.ts) cover all ACs. depends_on FR-BGSTAB-001, implemented/evolving (healthy).
